framework.name: Dual-Interaction Protocol: Browse vs. Payment Authorization
framework.description: Visa distinguishes two agent-merchant interaction modes with different signature requirements: (1) browsing interactions for product information, inventory checks, and pricing use 'agent-browser-auth' tag, (2) payment interactions for purchase completion use 'agent-payer-auth' tag. Both phases use same HTTP signature structure but different semantic tags and potentially different signed content in request bodies.
framework.raw_quote: In the context of Visa Intelligent Commerce, Agents are expected to interact with a Merchant site at two points... when the Agent is navigating to a product detail page... when the Agent is navigating to a checkout page to complete the purchase... tag: Will contain the value of agent-browser-auth or agent-payer-auth based on the type of interaction
